creator: freebsd.tug890@passmail.net
text:
Created attachment 254558
Update from 1.21.1 to 1.21.3

Hello,

A fix of previous version 1.21.2 has been released by Mojang. I modified initial port update to this version 1.21.3.

This patch updates games/minecraft-server to 1.21.3

Full changelog available on official website https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/article/minecraft-java-edition-1-21-3

It works fine on 14.1-RELEASE amd64.
